title: Bare Bones x Eating Animation
description: Retextures the Eating Animation mod to match the Bare Bones Resource Pack
body:
# Bare Bones x Eating Animation
### Based on the Bare Bones Eating Animation Addon by vaaritu
If you require a Resource Pack for Minecraft 1.19, you can download the Bare Bones Eating Animation Addon by vaaritu :3
> [Bare Bones Eating Animation Addon](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-eating-animation-addon)

Above Minecraft 1.21.4, the eating animations mod isn't needed anymore as Mojang added vanilla support for custom eating animations for any food item, thanks to the update by Ramz_

## Instruction
Bare Bones x Eating Animation retextures the animations from the Eating Animation mod. It acts to make the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) mod match the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)  Resource Pack
![:3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NjmqYWiU/images/563e0222c55b1a05801898149f5376f7fc8b5c23.png
)

## Mods support
Support [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) now!

Use the [Modded Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-bare-bones) to match the Create and the Bare Bones x Eating Animation.
![pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5b7939eb2c21b84620202ed413861a0c7f1cd53.png)
